people.name: Kassymbek Zhenis Mahmuduly
people.career:
Kassymbek Zhenis Mahmuduly was born in Zhambyl region in 1975.
He graduated from the Kazakh State Academy of Architecture and Construction with a degree in Architecture and Design. In 2001, he graduated from the Gumilyov Eurasian State University with a degree in Public Administration.
He began his career in 1997 as an intern researcher at Kazakh State Academy of Architecture and Construction.
In 1998 to 2000, he headed the department of the Committee for the Antimonopoly Policy of the Republic of Kazakhstan. He worked as the Director of the Water Transport Department of the Ministry of Transportation and Communications of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
In 2004 to 2005, he worked as the Director of Aktau International Sea Commercial Port.
In November 2005, he was appointed the Vice-Minister of Transport and Communications. Then he was the Executive Secretary of the Ministry of Transport and Communications. He later served as the Minister of Transport and Communications.
After that, he served as the Minister for Investment and Development and Minister of Industry and Infrastructure Development.
February 25, 2019 - Deputy Prime Minister of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
September 19, 2019 to December 2022 - Akim of Karaganda region.
December 08, 2022 - Akim of Astana

people.name: Nurkenov Nurlan Zhanbyrshyuly
people.career:
He is personally responsible for issues in the area of urban public transportation and communication, construction of road infrastructure, construction of LRT lines, snow removal, development of urban outskirts, state architectural and construction control, labor inspection, veterinary, plant protection, public utilities (water supply and water use), drainage issues, stormwater channels, utility networks
He was born on November 3, 1976, in the city of Tselinograd
Education:
Seifullin Akmola Agrarian University.
National School of Public Policy of the Academy under the President of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
Karaganda University of Economics.
In 1999-2006, he worked in various positions in Astana Akimat.
2017-2019 - State Inspector of the Administration of the President of the Republic of Kazakhstan, Astana.
2019 - 2022 - Deputy Akim of Nur-Sultan.
From 19.09.2022 - Deputy Akim of Astana
Since 09.01.2023 - First Deputy Akim of Astana

people.responsibilities: Управление охраны окружающей среды и природопользования города Астаны, Управление строительства города Астаны, Архитектура, градостроительство и земельные отношения

people.name: Baiken Yesset Berikuly
people.responsibilities: Управление внутренней политики города Астаны, Управления по делам религий города Астаны, Управление культуры города Астаны, Управление образования города Астаны, Управление по вопросам молодежной политики города Астаны, Управление по развитию языков и архивного дела города Астаны

people.name: Glotov Yevgeniy Sergeevich
people.responsibilities: Управление по инвестициям и развития предпринимательства города Астаны, Управление цифровизации и государственных услуг города Астаны, Управление жилья и жилищной инспекции города Астаны, Управление экономики и бюджетного планирования города Астаны

people.name: Otebayev Yersin Kenzhebayevich
people.responsibilities: Управление топливно-энергетического комплекса и коммунального хозяйства города Астаны, Управление строительства города Астаны, Управление коммунального хозяйства города Астаны, Транспорт және автожол басқармасы

people.name: Yeshkeyev Daulat Zatovich
people.position: Chief of Staff of the Astana Akim's Office
